name: delivery-workflow
description: Master delivery pipeline workflow orchestrating build, push, deploy, DNS, and verification

steps.name: Build Production Artifacts
steps.description: Run npm run check (lint + typecheck + build) to produce standalone Next.js output

steps.name: Push to GitHub
steps.description: Commit and push build artifacts to GitHub repository via Git Data API

steps.name: Deploy to Vercel
steps.description: Create Vercel project, configure environment, trigger production deployment, poll until READY

steps.name: Bind Custom Domain
steps.description: Bind apex and www domains to Vercel project

steps.name: Configure Cloudflare DNS
steps.description: Create A record (proxied) and CNAME (DNS-only) in Cloudflare

steps.name: Verify DNS Propagation
steps.description: Poll DNS resolution for apex and www domains (10 attempts × 5s)

steps.name: Verify HTTPS Certificates
steps.description: Fetch https://domain and https://www.domain, verify HTTP 200 (10 attempts × 10s)

steps.name: Production Verification
steps.description: Run 19-check post-deployment validation (homepage, dashboard, login, admin, error pages)

steps.name: Archive Delivery Report
steps.description: Generate and archive deployment report to reports/YYYY-MM-DD-{domain}.json
